name: Mexican Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Rotel tomatoes with chili peppers
1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
1 package corn tortillas, torn into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the ground beef with onion and garlic until no longer pink. Drain any excess fat.
2. Mix the cooked meat with the cans of tomatoes, soup, and beans in a casserole dish.
3. Spread half the tortillas on the bottom of the dish. Layer half the meat mixture on top.
4. Sprinkle half the cheese over the meat layer.
5. Repeat the layers with remaining ingredients.
6. Bake at 350°F until hot and bubbly, about 30-35 minutes.
7. Serve with shredded lettuce, chopped tomatoes, black olives, sour cream, jalapeno slices, and salsa.
